task-auth-001.description: Create IAuthService interface and auth types
acceptanceCriteria: types.ts exports IAuthService interface with signUp, signIn, signOut, getSession, onAuthStateChange methods
types.ts exports AuthResult type with user and error fields
types.ts exports AuthUser type matching schema (id, email, createdAt)
types.ts exports AuthSession type (user reference, lastRefreshedAt)
Interface has no runtime imports - types only
SupabaseAuthService implements IAuthService interface
Constructor accepts SupabaseClient instance
signUp calls supabase.auth.signUp and returns AuthResult
signIn calls supabase.auth.signInWithPassword and returns AuthResult
signOut calls supabase.auth.signOut
getSession calls supabase.auth.getSession and returns current session
onAuthStateChange wraps supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange and returns unsubscribe function
MockAuthService implements IAuthService interface
Uses in-memory Map to store registered users
signUp adds user to map and sets current session
signIn validates credentials against map and sets current session
signOut clears current session
getSession returns current session from memory
onAuthStateChange stores callback and calls it on state changes
Exposes reset() method to clear state between tests
IEnvironment.services includes optional auth?: IAuthService property
Existing code continues to work without auth service
IAuthService import added to environment/types.ts

task-auth-005.description: Create auth domain store with enhancement hooks
acceptanceCriteria: domain.ts exports AuthDomain ArkType scope with AuthUser and AuthSession entities
AuthSession.user uses MST reference syntax: user: 'AuthUser' (not userId: 'string')
domain.ts exports createAuthStore() factory using createStoreFromScope
enhanceModels adds AuthSession.isAuthenticated computed view (returns !!self.user)
enhanceCollections adds basic query methods (findByEmail for AuthUser)
enhanceRootStore adds initializeAuth action that calls getSession and syncs state
enhanceRootStore adds syncAuthState action that updates AuthUser and AuthSession from auth events
Store integrates with IAuthService via getEnv()
index.ts re-exports all types from types.ts
index.ts re-exports SupabaseAuthService from supabase.ts
index.ts re-exports MockAuthService from mock.ts
index.ts re-exports AuthDomain and createAuthStore from domain.ts
.env.example contains VITE_SUPABASE_URL placeholder
.env.example contains VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY placeholder
Comments explain how to obtain values from Supabase dashboard
AuthContext.tsx exports AuthProvider component
AuthProvider creates Supabase client from env vars using useRef for stability
AuthProvider creates auth store with SupabaseAuthService injected via environment
AuthProvider calls initializeAuth on mount to restore session
AuthProvider sets up onAuthStateChange listener and cleans up on unmount
AuthContext exports useAuthStore hook to access MST store
useAuth hook returns user (AuthUser | null) from store
useAuth hook returns isAuthenticated boolean from store view
useAuth hook manages loading state locally (useState)
useAuth hook manages error state locally (useState)
useAuth hook exposes signIn(email, password) that calls service and handles errors
useAuth hook exposes signUp(email, password) that calls service and handles errors
useAuth hook exposes signOut() that calls service and handles errors
Hook is wrapped with observer for MobX reactivity
LoginForm has email input field with validation
LoginForm has password input field
LoginForm has submit button that calls useAuth().signIn
LoginForm displays error message from useAuth().error
LoginForm shows loading state during sign in
LoginForm redirects to home on successful login
SignupForm has email input field with validation
SignupForm has password input field with minimum length validation
SignupForm has confirm password field with match validation
SignupForm has submit button that calls useAuth().signUp
SignupForm displays error message from useAuth().error
SignupForm shows loading state during sign up
SignupForm shows success message after signup (email confirmation)
ProtectedRoute wraps children and checks isAuthenticated
ProtectedRoute shows loading spinner while auth initializing
ProtectedRoute redirects to /login if not authenticated
ProtectedRoute renders children if authenticated
ProtectedRoute preserves intended destination for redirect after login
